mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_vectors (id, unit_name, unit_alias, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{unitName}, #{unitAlias}, #{vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, #{metadata}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unit_name = #{unitName}, unit_alias = #{unitAlias}, vector = #{vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, metadata = #{metadata}, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO customer_vectors (id, unit_name, unit_alias, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.unitName}, #{item.unitAlias}, #{item.vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, #{item.metadata}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unit_name = VALUES(unit_name), unit_alias = VALUES(unit_alias), vector = VALUES(vector), metadata = VALUES(metadata), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_name, unit_alias, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM customer_vectors ORDER BY id LIMIT #{topK}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM customer_vectors WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_name, unit_alias, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM customer_vectors
